title: Trump's latest China flare up presents chance to buy big tech names - analyst
sentences: Trump's latest China flare up presents chance to buy big tech names - analyst Wedbush Securities views the latest US-China tensions as a buying opportunity for big tech names, expecting a quick resolution to the diplomatic flare-up.
Analyst Dan Ives believes fears of a renewed trade war are exaggerated and points to signs of diplomatic cooling.
The investment firm maintains a bullish stance on the sector, predicting a 10% rally by year-end, with top picks including Microsoft, Nvidia, Apple, Palantir, Tesla, and Alphabet.
